title: Bluetooth Mouse for iPad MacBook Air Pro Mini Mac iPhone Tablet Cell Phone, Computer Wireless Mouse for Laptop PC Desktop, Dual Mode (Bluetooth + 2.4G), Portable Optical Cordless Mice Silent (Silver)
description:
Specifications:
Bluetooth Edition: Bluetooth 5.0 Mouse Dimensions: 4.21 X 2.36 X 1.26 inchs Mouse Weight: 2.05 ounces Operating Range: Up to 33 ft/ 10 meters Buttons Number: 3 Keys DPI Level: 1600 DPI Battery Powered: 1 AA battery powered,
Battery NOT Included
The mouse supports Bluetooth and 2.4GHz USB connection
Note: The Bluetooth Mouse only compatible with iPad OS/iOS 13 and above. So you need to update the system of your ipad and iphone to iPad OS/iOS 13 and above, and turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch, then connect the mouse.
How to connect Bluetooth mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to Bluetooth. 2: Then Turn on the Bluetooth switch of your tablet or mobile phone, and search for Bluetooth mouse. 3: Click the Bluetooth mouse on tablet phone or other devices to connect to your device.
How to connect 2.4GHz USB mouse:
1: Turn on the power ON/OFF, switch to 2.4G. 2: Then insert the USB receiver into the USB port of the notebook or computer, and then you can use it.
Package Included:
1x Dual Mode Mouse (Bluetooth+2.4GHz) 1x USB Receiver 1x User Manual
Broad Compatibility:
Compatible with iPadOS iPad 10.2/9.7 5th 6th 7th 8th 9th gen, iPad Air 10.5/10.9, iPad Pro 11/12.9 2nd 3rd 4th 5th generation, iPad Mini 5/4/3, iPhone 12 11 pro max, iPhone X XS XR max, etc.
Q&A
Where is the USB receiver?
The USB receiver is in the mouse, you can find it when you open the mouse's battery cover. When you don't use it, you can plug the nano receiver into the USB storage slot again, so you don't lose the USB.
Connectivity and USB troubleshooting
Restart your computer and make sure the mouse is turned on and not too far away from the USB Receiver.
Warranty: 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.
Bluetooth mouse only compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above.
features: Wide Compatibility: The mouse compatible with Windows XP/ Vista/ 7/ 8/ 10/ 11, Chrome OS, Mac OS, Android, iOS, and perfect for laptop notebook PC computer desktop chromebook, Apple iPhone iPad, iPad Air, iPad Mini, iPad Pro, MacBook Air, MacBook Pro, Mac iMac Samsung Galaxy Tab/ Note/ S tablet smartphone Surface Pro and other multi device.【Bluetooth mouse compatible with iPad OS/ iOS 13 and above, turn on “Assistive Touch”: Setting> Accessibility> Touch> Assistive Touch】

Dual-Mode Mouse (2.4G + Bluetooth 5.0): 2.4GHz wireless mode, plug and play, no need to download drivers. Bluetooth mode, easy to connect and pair. Both modes provide a reliable and stable connection up to 33 feet with virtually no drop-outs and delays. The wireless mouse realizes free switches between two devices with one mouse only by one click. Note: You can't use Bluetooth and 2.4G mode at the same time. The USB dongle is stored in the compartment next to the mouse battery slot.

Comfortable & Quiet Click: The wireless mouse features a hand-friendly contoured shape for all-day comfort. Quiet clicks allow you to focus on your work without worrying about disturbing others or causing unwanted distracting noises. 1600 DPI cursor sensitivity provides smooth, precise tracking and scrolling for easy navigation on most surfaces. The sturdy rubber scroll wheel prevents your hands from slipping when rolling. The nano receiver is stored on the back of the mouse.

Long Battery Life: The mouse is powered by 1 AA battery (battery is not included). The mouse will enter into auto-sleep mode after 10 minutes of inactivity, and you can click any key to wake it up. Long battery life and working time, it can be used for months without battery replacement. There is an ON/ OFF button on the back of the mouse, which can be turned off to save power. Battery NOT included.

Protable & Durable Design: The ergonomic design and smooth surface fit your hands perfectly and provide you with a comfortable experience. You can take it anywhere you need it for office, home, meetings or travel. Tested over 3 million clicks to ensure mouse durability. What You Will Get: Wireless Bluetooth Mouse, USB Receiver, User Manual, 18 months warranty, and our friendly customer service.

reviews.title: Kind of slow
reviews.text: A little slow at waking up and responding, but it is ok.

reviews.title: I couldn't have asked for a better productivity tool
reviews.text:
This item has been with me for such a short time that I am still breaking it in. So far these are my notes.

This mouse takes advantage of both Bluetooth and 2.4G technology

The connection tends to become unstable after a few months, reconnect to solve the issue

If you are unfortunate enough to have more than one device with need for a mouse, switching between them will be time consuming and confusing due to the syncing required.

Its slim profile also makes it easy to store when not in use.

The battery life lasts for weeks

The power conserving switch saves battery life

Totally worth the price!

I hope this is helpful.

reviews.title: Comfortable to hold & easy to pair
reviews.text: My husband is using this mouse for his MacBook Pro and he says it's working great! It was easy to pair with his laptop. Just turn the bluetooth on, then press the pairing button on the back of the mouse and the devices will find each other. The mouse is comfortable for him to hold and use. He says it's quiet and responsive. We haven't had it long enough to comment on battery longevity, but so far so good.

reviews.title: Cute item but it doesn't stay connected.
reviews.text:
Super cute item! It took me a while to get use to the small click space and it tracks well but the main issues is the USB isn't reliable. Anytime I put the laptop to sleep or I don't use the mouse for a while I have to unplug the USB and turn the mouse on/off. It is really inconvenient but my return wind has closed to exchange it.

Looks are a 10 and functionality is a 2 because it does not work as intended.

reviews.title: low quality
reviews.text: I received a replacement for the first one that would shut off and on constantly. The 2nd one worked for about a week and then stopped. When trying to remove the USB connector from my laptop it cam apart. Part of it got stuck in the USB port. It took over 5 minutes to pull the rest of it out with tweezers! I returned it for a refund. This is a low quality piece of junk. Do not buy.

reviews.title: Cheap- don’t buy it!
reviews.text: This mouse works some of the time... very cute but unreliable. For the return process, I had to pack and ship on my own. It cost half the price of the mouse to return.

reviews.title: Cutest thing ever
reviews.text: So adorable! It moves super smoothly and I love the color. It is wider than most mice I'd say, but not by much. It still feels natural and easy to use. The buttons are easy to use as well. My only concern is that when I have to wake my computer up from sleep mood, I really have to shake it. But that may be my sensitivity settings, but they were just fine with my previous mouse. Either way, this is super cute and I love it!

reviews.title: DESTROYS PORTS! DO NOT BUY!
reviews.text: The first one died after 2 hours. It damaged the port on one side of my laptop. The replacement did the same thing to the other side. I now have no functioning ports - can’t use another mouse or flash drives. This company owes me a new laptop!!!!

reviews.title: Loud click, nice feel on your fingers, good for small hands
reviews.text:
Pros:
- Material on your hands feels silky. Great feel.
- Scroll wheel works nicely.
- Tracking is fine.
- Battery rather than recharge, which I like because all of the recharging ones die within a year
- On/Off switch to save your battery
- Excellent for smaller hands. I wear women's gloves size S, and this fits my hands really well.

Cons:
- The click. I have a thing with clicks. It's maddening to hear yourself click loudly all day. If the click were silent, this would be the perfect mouse. Maybe I'm a little neurotic, but it's distracting for me.

Neutral:
- The LED light near your thumb is small. I don't know why so many of mice have light strips. It seems like something else to use up the battery. I'd prefer to not have any lights, outside of what's necessary underneath for a track light. Not a big deal, and better than most.

Other:
- Made In China
- 6D Optical Mouse
- Takes 2 AAA Batteries

reviews.title: you get what you pay for
reviews.text: these work but feel like crap.  Left and right click are terrible.  Sometimes when I left click, as the piece of plastic is coming back up, it goes under the right side.  Its like someone took a solid sheet of plastic and cut a line down the middle to allow you to press down on the left or right side, its terrible.  Scroll wheel feels fine.  DPI button just cycles through, no way to go up or down, just cycles through 3 modes.  Very uncomfortable.  For the price, you get two and both are exactly like this so I doubt its defective.  I only got these to control my streaming PC so its not a HUGE deal, but if youre getting these for daily use - DONT DO IT.  I can hardly put up with these and I use them for maybe 10 mins a day.  Pay 15$ for one mouse.  I honestly feel like I could crush these with my hand - thats how crappy they feel.  They also go to sleep mode after like 5 mins so I have to constantly click it to wake it up, and it ends up opening apps.  Not worth the 15$

reviews.title: Corel Office
reviews.text: Only purchased because it stated it was "like" Microsoft. But I should have read closer, It stated it was compatible with Microsoft. Still, the software is easy to use and installs without problem. Great starter for maybe the high school student wanting to learn basics. For my deeper needs in business, it is a little light but starting with Corel then transferring to Microsoft files are very easy and NO data is lost as of yet. I do say it is a good value

title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse, Rechargeable Slient Multi-Device Computer Mice (Tri-Mode: BT1/2+2.4Ghz) with USB Receiver, Ergonomic Cordless Mouse for Laptop/MacBook/PC/iPad(Mint Green to Purple)
features: 🎉INNOVATIVE GRADIENT COLOUR DESIGN - Innovative unique gradient color that shocks your perspective. coupled with fine craftsmanship, make your mouse shine. Is a perfect gift choice.

🎉EASY TO CONTROL 3 DEVICE - Dual Bluetooth 5.1 modes and wireless 2.4G technology. It realizes accessible switches between 3 devices by clicking the mode switch button located at the bottom of the mouse. The indication lights of BT1, BT2, and 2.4G USB are green, blue, and red, respectively. Simple & convenient to work from the desktop to the tablet, or laptop to Macbook、iPad, etc.

🎉RECHARGEABLE & AUTO SLEEP FUNCTION - Supports TYPE C to TYPE C cable charging. It can be easily fast and stable charged using the USB C cable without replacing the battery. Better energy efficiency and environmental protection. It will enter sleep mode after 1.5 minutes of inactivity for power saving, and wake it up by clicking any button or moving the mouse.

🎉SILENT CLICK & HIGH RESPONSIVENESS - This noiseless mouse reduces the noise by up to 90%, no need to worry about the click sound disturbing others. 3 Adjustable DPI Settings(800, 1200, and 1600)are very precise with every sensitive movement.

🎉COMFORTABLE & DURABLE DESIGN - Ergonomic design with an elegant profile. It has 6 buttons including 2 buttons for forward and backward on the left side ideal for both work and gaming. Tested over 5 million times click lifespan ensure long-term stable use.

🎉WIDE COMPATIBILITY - The BT 5.1 is compatible with windows 8/10(but not windows 7 or XP), Android, and Mac OS systems; the 2.4G USB connected mode supports any USB-enabled device, which just needs to insert the USB receiver. It Fits desktops, laptops, PC, Macbooks, Chromebook, and Surface pro.

Note: 1. Bluetooth 5.1 supports the ios system for both iPad and iPhones, but the ios system has to be ios 14 or later version; 2. the side buttons are not available for Mac OS, but the other function can be used normally.

reviews.title: False advertisement
reviews.text:
See attached image. This is what you get. Colors of the actual item and the color of the advertised item. Not even close. Mouse itself is "ok" at best. DPI button makes noise like it is a mouse straight from 1990s. Item returned.

Update: Seller reached out to me and sent out a replacement, white and blue version. Mouse received and the colors are true to the image. DPI button needs improvement and the seller has promised to continue working on that feature. Otherwise can only say that it was a proper and appreciated gesture from the seller. Score updated to 4/5 for customer service.

reviews.title: Perfect Mouse for size and function!
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:765cefcf509f1ae4e5ecc0b46111d5ea]] Pros - lots of practical features such as soft click, back/fwd, click scroll wheel for multi directional pointer, also connects to multiple devices at the same time. Battery life is great as well and it also works while charging. Price is so good I bought a couple of them for my home office and work office as well as gifts for co-workers. Looks great on desk as well.

Cons - None really but the feet on the bottom have tiny invisible plastic packaging wrap on them that has to be peeled off or it becomes old and sticky making mouse hard to move. Took me a hot minute to figure this out.

reviews.title: RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
reviews.text:
RAPIQUE Bluetooth Wireless Mouse
Great mouse. USB C re-chargeable. Can run in bluetooth or RF mode. Lights up so can see when lights are off. Feels great. Compact but not to compact, is still comfortable and ergonomical.
Affordable.
I used to buy the well known name brand mouse that can cost 2 to 4 times the price. With the competitor mouse after about 6 to 12 months it would start to double click. I now feel maybe that is "planned obsolence", so I will no longer buy that mouse.
The main shortcuts I use are forward and back which are already on two side buttons. I then also use Start + D for Desktop, so I can do that with this mouse.
Liked it so much bought 2 more for my other laptops / backups.
Great mouse.

reviews.title: Works well, when it connects.  Update:  It loses connection WAY too much
reviews.text:
I like the mouse. Excellent value for money, except for one very annoying flaw. It is constantly disconnecting the bluetooth connection from my new Macbook Pro. It's pretty annoying.

After what feels like only a few minutes of idle time, the mouse bluetoothe disconnects. Then when I move it nothing happens for a couple seconds. The finally, it connects and my laptop tells me the mouse is back, and it works perfectly... until the next time it is idle.

I have use other low cost brands as well as my Apple Magic Mouse (which I don't use as I prefer a track wheel). I have not had any issues with the Bluetooth on those, only this one...

If it were not for the disconnect issue I would rate the mouse a 5 star. Otherwise, I give it a 3. I am still using it for now, but will find a better one...

UPDATE: Okay, I find that I am CONSTANTLY drustrated that this mouse loses connection with my laptop. PITA. Not worth using at any price.

reviews.title: Junk
reviews.text: Even after swapping out the battery, and making sure it’s in pairing mode, it refuses to pair with any device I’ve tried and doesn’t show up in my Bluetooth menu as a visible device. It very briefly showed up on my Macbook as a keyboard, but never as a mouse, and now it won’t even do that. Save your money and get a mouse that will work.

reviews.title: Good but wanted more features
reviews.text:
I bought this in a time crunch. My wired mouse was getting hard to use because the scroll wheel had shifted out of place. I had several wireless mice around, but none of them still had their wireless receiver. And they were before the days of Bluetooth. So, I had was in the market for a new one.

This one is nice. It fits the hand well and all. But, I realized that it did not have the features that I was used to. First, it is not a quiet mouse. I did not notice at first, but when it penetrated my fog of concentration, I could not unhear it. Click. Click. Click! And, this was not great for conference calls either.

The other issue was that it tracked slower than I would like. I was still using my wired mouse at this point, so I did not want to change mouse settings via software. I really missed having a dpi button on my mouse. This is important to me as I use a laptop on an extended display to a 2nd monitor. So, I need to be able to zip from one end of the screen the other - quick enough to unmute and answer a question during a conference call.

Have to click to wake up the mouse kept catching my attention - which means it was on it's way to annoying me... I have worked with computers for so long, it's like an extension of me. It needs to be intuitive to use and not interrupt my flow.

And, at this point, I figured out that I would need to use two different computers at once. And, while I could pair this wireless mouse with a wired one, the USB ports required were a challenge. My newer computer has no USB C ports at all. So, this limited my set-up options. Secondly, I now had 2 mice crowding limited desk space.

So, I learned that there was such a thing as multi-device mice. And, I found one that can switch between two computers and a iPad - with a simple LED indicator so that you know which device you are controlling. I bought the also designed to be silent and to switch between different dpi. All these features and it was only $3 more.

This is what I bought to replace this one - Arteck Multi-Device Wireless Bluetooth Mouse with Nano USB Receiver Ergonomic Right Hand Silent Clicking for Computer Desktop PC Laptop Mac iPad and Windows 10/8 iPad OS Build in Rechargeable Battery

So, to sum it up, I would say that I need the speed and responsiveness of a gamer's mouse with the silent clicks and 3 device connects like an office worker. So, this mouse is ok. But, if you are an advance or intense user, you may find that it does meet your needs.

reviews.title: I use this four days a week and it is perfect.
reviews.text:
I use this to carry my favorite mouse from home to work and back again four days a week. It's perfect. There's nothing wrong with it. I highly recommend it.
Update June 4, 2022, this mouse case is still perfect! Money well spent!

reviews.title: Love this mouse
reviews.text: This the perfect ergonomic mouse for the daily computer use. Love this mouse i highly recommend it

reviews.title: Classy styling; good fit; great price.
reviews.text: I love the way the case looks and how it fits. I recommend and would buy it again. The clip that came with it is cheep though - I’ll put a more reliable clip on the case.

title: FD V8 Wireless Mouse Battery Included, 2.4G Cute Colorful Animal Slim Silent Travel Cordless Mouse Optical Designed Mice with Nano Receiver Compatible for Laptop Computer PC Chromebook (Blue Fox)
features: 2.4GHz Wireless ensures reliable connection with a long working distance of up to 10m and 250Hz super high speed rate of return, which eliminates delays, dropouts and interference.

Cute Animals matte surface, quiet & ergonomic design and comfortable cherry wheel provide all-day comfort for work and entertainment, portable and perfect for travel as well, just enjoy it with its silent click.

Intelligent power saving design eliminates the need to change batteries often. The wireless mouse will enter into power saving mode after 5 minutes free, click left or right button to wake it when you want it to work again, so the on and off switch is not required.
A tiny USB Nano receiver (stored within the back of the mouse) conveniently slots into your computer's USB port, and takes up minimal space. No need to drive, plug and play directly.

Work with Laptop, Notebook, Computer, PC, Mac, Chrome book and more. 30 days money-back & 6-months guaranty, when you are not satisfied with our product, please don't hesitate to get a after-sale service, we will give you a satisfied response within 24 hours.

reviews.title: Jumps
reviews.text: COuld not slow down this mouse to be useable.

reviews.title: Works perfectly
reviews.text: Bought this for my grandson for his birthday and it worked perfectly right away. He loves it.

reviews.title: Tricky to set up
reviews.text: At first I was very displeased because I did not realize the USB was INSIDE the mouse. Then I had to replace the battery in it to get it to finally work. Now that its is working I love it. It does very well with my Macbook Air. Its not highly ergonomic, so if you need extra comfort I would choose another mouse.

reviews.title: will not buy again
reviews.text: waste of money did not work  on button did not work

reviews.title: Great mouse
reviews.text: Works great and I have not had any problems. I have had it a while.

title: Corsair Ironclaw Wireless RGB, Rechargeable Wireless Optical Gaming Mouse with Slipstream Technology (18,000 DPI Optical Sensor, 3-Zone RGB Multi-Colour Backlighting), Black
description: The Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless Gaming Mouse combines an ultra-accurate native 18, 000 DPI optical sensor with a durable contoured shape that’s ideal for larger hands and palm grips. Easily connect to your PC via hyper-fast, sub-1ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless Technology Bluetooth or USB wired connection, with up to 50 hours of battery life. Powerful Corsair iCUE software allows you to precisely tune sensitivity in 1 DPI steps, customize the ten programmable buttons with macros or remaps, and synchronize your mouse’s three-zone RGB lighting with all your iCUE-compatible Corsair devices. With the freedom of wireless and the customizable precision you need to take your gameplay higher, take victory in hand with the Corsair Ironclaw RGB Wireless.
features: Three Ways to Game: Connect with hyper-fast, sub-1 ms Slipstream Corsair Wireless technology, low-latency bluetooth, or USB wired
Comfort when it counts: Contoured shape that’s sculpted specifically for palm-grips and larger hands

Powerfully precise optical gaming sensor: A custom Pixart PMW3391 native 18,000 DPI sensor, adjustable in one DPI resolution steps, gives you total sensitivity customization and ultra-accurate tracking
Ten fully programmable buttons: Customise the way you play with powerful macros and key remaps to give you an in-game advantage
Ultra-durable Omron Switches: Rated for more than 50 million clicks

reviews.title: Excellent design and clean software- dollar store plastic mouse
reviews.text:
Worked great for three months; varying software issues and the mouse spontaneous resetting had us replace the mouse with the same one, as the setup and software for this mouse is very easy. The programmable buttons are easy to reach and press. However, if I am paying 200 for a mouse, I expected more than 3 months of use.

Edited to add:
New mouse worked almost two months before the mouse wheel stopped functioning. Went to a different brand. Cannot in good conscience recommend.

reviews.title: Mouse Hasn't Worked Properly Since Day 1, Customer Service Slow to Respond/Ineffective
reviews.text:
I bought this mouse brand new. It has NEVER worked as advertised, and Corsair's customer support team has done nothing to make it right. The mouse couldn't connect via GHz on my Macbook (despite Corsair and its reps claiming it should work on macOS. See:

https://www.amazon.com/ask/questions/Tx1JD042VHLLA6L/ref=ask_dp_dpmw_al_hza

I then tried to use a Windows laptop to connect to iCUE and program the mouse. AGAIN, nothing. They've implied that the mouse might have some compatibility issues, but that should've been addressed! They haven't even offered to refund me or replace the mouse. Stay far away from this mouse, and if you value good, responsive customer service, stay away from this company.

reviews.title: Good mouse for the most part
reviews.text: I bought mine at Best Buy and not Amazon. It lasted about a year and a half. Still mostly works but the wheel button doesn't work anymore.  If you are going to use the wheel button a lot, don't buy this mouse. Other problems include the battery doesn't last too long, can't customize when it is in Bluetooth mode, and it has the habit of thinking every time you plug it into the computer to charge it is a new mouse so it creates a new profile. It looks great and feels great though and I would buy it again if it didn't cost so much money

title: elec Space Wireless Mouse，Cool Sport Car Shape Computer Wireless Mouse Optical Cordless Mice with USB Receiver for PC Laptop 1600 DPI 3 Buttons Black
description:
Cool sport car shaped wireless mouse for laptop computer notebook,eyecatching ergonomic design,good choice as gifts for both kids and adults. Mini Receiver can be contained into the mouse and easy to carry.Light weight enough to take it everywhere. Uses 2.4Ghz wireless optical technology, transmission up to 10 metres operating distance. Plug and play, no need any drive, works on most surfaces smoothly Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS. With cool design and comfortable hand feeling,this wireless mouse give you special experience in using it.   Powered by 2 * AAA battery (Not Included),Dimension:4.4(L)*1.42(H)*2.16(W)inch,Net weight: 2.12 oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons.   Switch Life: 5 million cycles,Automatically Power saving sleeping function.
How to use:
1.Please slide the top cover backwards,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot;When using it, it is best to plug the USB receiver into the computer first and then install the battery to turn the switch on. Prepare 2* AAA battery when you first use it(not included);Turn on the switch,use on mouse pad,the mouse and receiver will connect automatically in a few seconds. 2.If not connect,please turn off the mouse switch,pull down the USB receiver,then plug the USB receiver and turn on the mouse switch again, press the 3 buttons(left button,right button,scroll wheel) together at same time for about 3-5 seconds.
Notes:
Cute design with LED headlight,the headlight is formed only because of light transmission,sometimes it hides inside that you cannot see it,this won't affect use. The light is not strong,this could save battery power.
Package Included:
1 x Wireless mouse 1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover) 1 x Using instruction
features: Wireless usb computer mouse with headlight and fashion sport car design, cool gaming mouse for laptop computer,good choice for using or as Christmas gifts for kids,women,men.
Powered by 2*AAA battery(Not included),Size: 4.4*2.16*1.42 inch,Net weight: 2.12 oz,1600 DPI,3 Buttons (Push the top cover,then you can see the USB receiver and battery slot inside).
Plug and Play, no any drive is needed;Power-saving sleeping function,if the mouse is not used for short time, it will turn to power saving mode to save energy.
2.4GHz wireless digital transmission technology, operation distance is up to 10 meters; Package Included:1 x Wireless mouse1 x USB receiver (placed inside the top cover)1 x Using instruction.
Support most operating system, Windows 98 / ME / NT / 2000 / XP / Vista / Win 7 / Linux or Mac OS and more.

reviews.title: Love it
reviews.text: I’ve dropped it a couple of time but it still works. Make sure you get the electronic batteries because it will die fast.

reviews.title: Did not work, Wasted money
reviews.text: Took almost a month to arrive. When it did arrive, the mouse didn’t work. When it was late, they offered me some money back, but when I asked for a full refund for the non-working product, I never heard from them again.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: Perfect size and works well.... becareful opening the top of car to insert battery because it’s very easy to break the clasp, as I did. The clasp aren’t very durable at all.
